title: storage — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules published by StorageServiceProvider::boot(). Consumers use them in FormRequest / Data class rule sets.

rules.name: valid_mime_for_kind
rules.description: Ensures the uploaded file's sniffed MIME matches the target kind's allowed_mimes list. Sniff is finfo-based; client Content-Type header is IGNORED.

rules.name: max_size_for_kind
rules.description: Ensures the uploaded file's size does not exceed the kind's max_size_mb.
rules.default_message: The :attribute may not be larger than :max_mb MB.

rules.name: valid_file_kind
rules.description: Ensures the value is a registered kind key.
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a recognised file kind.

rules.name: unique_sha256_within_workspace
rules.description: For kinds that opt out of dedup (`#[FileKind(dedupable: false)]`), enforces sha256 uniqueness within the workspace. Skipped for dedupable kinds — duplicates are the expected case there.
rules.default_message: A file with identical content already exists in this workspace.

rules.name: valid_signed_url_reason
rules.description: Ensures the requested signed-URL reason is permitted for the caller. `share` and `admin_action` require elevated permissions.

rules.name: valid_cidr
rules.description: Validates that a string is a valid CIDR block. Used for ip_lock validation on signed-URL issue requests. Accepts IPv4 (`192.0.2.0/24`) and IPv6 (`2001:db8::/32`) formats.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid CIDR block.
